subject: bdist_rpm configuration
truth: Stop using bdist_rpm configuration; it has been removed.

subject: 20221023 storage format support
truth: Stop using .plaso storage files in the 20221023 format; they cannot be read and must be regenerated.

subject: SQLite-based storage reader/writer class names
old: old SQLite storage reader/writer class names
new: renamed SQLite storage reader/writer class names
truth: Stop importing the old SQLite storage reader/writer class names; use the renamed versions.
quote: Renamed SQLite-base storage reader and writer (#4856)

from_fact: old sqlite storage reader/writer class names
renamed sqlite storage reader/writer class names

subject: winlnk DLT event generation
new: winlnk no longer generates duplicate DLT events
truth: winlnk no longer generates duplicate DLT events; code relying on duplicate DLT events will break.
quote: Changed winlnk to not generate duplicate DLT events #4831 (#4833)

from_fact: winlnk no longer generates duplicate dlt events

subject: Python 3.7 support
truth: Stop using Python 3.7; plaso now requires Python 3.8+.

subject: data file location
new: data files moved into Python module
truth: Data files were moved into the Python module; code or scripts referencing the old external data file paths will break.
quote: Moved data files into Python module #4769 (#4810)

from_fact: data files moved into python module

subject: SessionStart, SessionConfiguration, SessionCompletion
old: SessionStart, SessionConfiguration, SessionCompletion attribute container classes
truth: Stop using SessionStart, SessionConfiguration, and SessionCompletion from the storage/session API; they have been removed.

from_fact: sessionstart, sessionconfiguration, sessioncompletion attribute container classes

subject: event parser attribute
truth: Stop using the event `parser` attribute; use `parser_chain` instead. The backwards-compatibility shim has been removed.
quote: remove backwards compatibility for parser attribute — related to renaming parser to parser_chain (issue #3700) (PR #4713)

subject: --process_archives CLI option
truth: Stop passing --process_archives to log2timeline.py; it has been removed and invocations will error.

subject: text-based filter file support
truth: Stop using text-based filter files; filtering now requires YAML-based artifact filter files.
quote: remove text-based filter file support and its documentation (PR #4721)

subject: plist plugin macosx_install_history
truth: Stop referencing the plist plugin as `macosx_install_history`; use `macos_install_history` instead. The old name no longer matches.

subject: command-line tool invocation
old: log2timeline.py, psort.py, pinfo.py, psteal.py, image_export.py as standalone scripts
new: tools migrated to Python entry points / console_scripts
truth: Stop running log2timeline.py, psort.py, pinfo.py, psteal.py, image_export.py as standalone scripts; use the installed console_scripts entry points instead.

from_fact: log2timeline.py, psort.py, pinfo.py, psteal.py, image_export.py as standalone scripts
tools migrated to python entry points / console_scripts
